title: Delegates in Unreal
summary: Delegates in Unreal Engine play an essential role in creating modular, decoupled, and event-driven code. They allow one object to call a function on another object without hard-wiring the dependency between them, which is perfect for implementing event-driven behavior. content: Delegates in Unreal Engine play an essential role in creating modular, decoupled, and event-driven code. They allow one object to call a function on another object without hard-wiring the dependency between them, which is perfect for implementing event-driven behavior. In Unreal, delegates are especially useful in game development to handle events, respond to actions, or manage callbacks.
